title: Top IPs from Nginx Access Log
description: Parse an Nginx Combined Log Format access log and find the top N IP addresses by request count. The first field of each log line is the client IP address. Return a sorted list of (ip, count) tuples in descending order of count.
constraints: Log lines follow Nginx Combined Log Format where the first space-separated field is the IP
N defaults to 5 if not specified
Return an empty list for empty input
Ties in count can be broken in any order

examples.explanation: 192.168.1.1 appears twice, 192.168.1.2 appears once. With n=5 (default), both are returned sorted by count descending.

starter_code.python:
def top_ips(log_content: str, n: int = 5) -> list[tuple[str, int]]:
    pass

test_cases.description: Empty log content returns empty list
Multiple IPs with ties, default n=5
